title: 4X Wooden Door Wedge Beech Wood Door Stopper Jammer Pack of 4 Natural BPA and Plastic Free - by ADAM Deals
features: Natural Wood & Eco Friendly: Wooden door stops made of natural beech wood. Toxic free, No plastic, no BPA and no harmful chemicals

This is a set of 4 wooden wedges, perfect for holding doors open or shut, preventing loud, irritating slams and protect doors from snapping due to wind. A stopper could also act as a protector for a child’s or baby's fingers
Suitable for All Floors: The wooden anti slam door jammers are great for carpets, laminate, stone floor, tile flooring and wood flooring
Wide Application: These door stops are perfect for home, office, school, restaurant, as well as industrial and commercial use
Lightweight and Portable: These portable door stoppers can carried while travelling to use in hotels, holiday homes and other such places
High-Quality Wood: This wooden door stops wedge set is made with high-quality wood, giving each door stopper a consistent style and functionality
Need to know: These door stops are 150mm long, with the thick end of the wedge of 23mm high, this means that any door with a gap at the bottom of 22mm or lower will be held securely by the wedges
Complete Set: When you purchase this product, you'll receive four beech wood door stoppers, providing you with the perfect solution for your doors.
description: Product Description Sustainable and Stylish Door Wedges Discover the perfect combination of style and functionality with our 4X Wooden Door Wedges. Crafted from premium natural beech wood, these stoppers are designed to last while adding a touch of elegance to your space. Their solid construction ensures reliable performance, securely holding doors in place and protecting floors and walls. Lightweight and portable, they are easy to move and perfect for use around the home or office Versatile Design for All Spaces These wooden door wedges are built to work seamlessly with most doors, whether indoors or outdoors. Featuring a sturdy design and a natural finish , they complement any home or office decor while providing reliable functionality. Made from high-quality materials, these door stoppers ensure durability while protecting your floors and doors from wear and tear. Perfect for use on carpets, tiles, stone, or wood flooring, they fit effortlessly into any setting. Universal Compatibility for All Floor Surfaces Designed for versatility, these wooden door wedges work seamlessly on a variety of surfaces, including tiles, carpets, wooden floors, and cement. Their stable and anti-slip design ensures they remain securely in place, no matter the flooring type. Perfect for homes, offices, and industrial spaces, these stoppers provide reliable functionality without damaging floors. Keep your doors steady and your floors protected with these adaptable wedges. Enhanced Safety for Children and Babies More than just a door wedge, this wooden stopper acts as a safety protector, preventing children and babies from injuring their fingers in door gaps. Its durable design ensures the door remains securely in place, offering peace of mind for families. Perfect for use in nurseries, playrooms, or any area where little ones explore. Keep your home safe with this reliable solution. Material High-quality natural beech wood, free from BPA, plastic, and harmful chemicals. Dimensions Specifies the size – 150mm in length, 23mm height at the thick end, suitable for door gaps of 22mm or less Compatibility Compatible with tiles, carpets, wood, and cement floors for universal application. Quantity Pack includes 4 wooden door wedges, ideal for multiple uses Design Anti-slip wedge design with a smooth finish to prevent damage to floors and doors Safety Feature Acts as a finger guard to protect children and babies from door injuries. Practical, Durable, and Elegantly Designed for Everyday Use Designed with practicality and elegance in mind, these wooden door wedges offer an effortless solution for managing your doors. Beyond their functional benefits, they serve as a long-lasting addition to your household essentials. Crafted to complement both contemporary and traditional interiors, their smooth finish and lightweight construction make them easy to handle and store. Ideal for creating a secure, slam-free environment in busy spaces like homes, offices, or schools, these wedges add convenience to your daily routine
